calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Set For Trial On Oct-05-17 At 10:40 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Continued To Oct-05-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Tad Nguyen - Plaintiff/Appellee; Precision Engineering, Inc., represented by Finbar Brody - Defendant/Appellant

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are placed under oath.

Mr. Tad Nguyen testifies on behalf of himself. The following evidence is submitted for consideration by the Court but neither marked for identification nor retained by the Court:

- Damage Repair Estimate (written document)
- Cell Phone photo of accident scene (electronic media)

Mr. Finbar Brody testifies on behalf of Precision Engineering, Inc. The following evidence is submitted for consideration by the Court but neither marked for identification nor retained by the Court:

- Traffic Control Plan (written document)
- Video of accident scene shortly after the accident (electronic media).

The hearing concludes whereupon the Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-15-2017 Judgment Entered
